services.title: Home Rewiring
services.description: Complete electrical updates for older homes. Modern wiring that handles today's appliances safely.

services.title: Panel Upgrades
services.description: Electrical panel replacement and circuit additions. More power when you need it.

services.title: Lighting Installation
services.description: Interior and exterior lighting solutions. New fixtures, switches, and controls.

services.title: Outlet & Switch Repair
services.description: Fix dead outlets, flickering lights, and faulty switches. Fast diagnostic and repair.

about.heading: Columbus Electricians You Can Count On
about.body: We're a Columbus electrical team that shows up when we say we will. One call, fair quote, honest work.

reviews.name: Eddie H.
reviews.text: Totally dependable team. On time, fair quote, and stuck to it. Quick but thorough work. No surprises, just honest quality.

reviews.name: Lydia R.
reviews.text: Great job with home electrical work. The electrician was on time and very skilled at his job.

reviews.name: Alison L.
reviews.text: Love the updated wiring and lights. Excellent service and communication throughout.

cta.heading: Ready for Reliable Electrical Work?
cta.body: Fair quotes, on-time service, and no surprises. Call today for your free estimate.
